summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Introduction to Three Dimensional Geometry in mathematics.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 11 mathematics explains the core concepts of Introduction to Three Dimensional Geometry. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
